st.orm.core.spi.TransactionTemplate

Packages that use TransactionTemplate
Package
Description
st.orm.core.spi
 

  • Uses of TransactionTemplate in st.orm.core.spi

    Methods in st.orm.core.spi that return TransactionTemplate
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    TransactionTemplate
    DefaultTransactionTemplateProviderImpl.getTransactionTemplate()
     
    static TransactionTemplate
    Providers.getTransactionTemplate()
     
    TransactionTemplate
    TransactionTemplateProvider.getTransactionTemplate()
    Returns a transaction template.
    TransactionTemplate
    TransactionTemplate.isolation(int isolation)
    Set the isolation level, such as DEFAULT, REPEATABLE_READ, READ_COMMITTED, READ_UNCOMMITTED and SERIALIZABLE.
    TransactionTemplate
    TransactionTemplate.propagation(String propagation)
    Set the propagation, such as DEFAULT, REQUIRED, REQUIRES_NEW, NESTED.
    TransactionTemplate
    TransactionTemplate.readOnly(boolean readOnly)
    Set whether to optimize as read-only transaction.
    TransactionTemplate
    TransactionTemplate.timeout(int timeoutSeconds)
    Set the transaction timeout to apply, as number of seconds.
